name: us-national
title: US national datasets (LANDFIRE) — vegetation typing anywhere in CONUS
description: A region-agnostic pack for the continental US. It does not encode one place's botany; it uses LANDFIRE 2024 EVT (a national 30 m product) to type trees evergreen/deciduous and name their community, so any CONUS twin gets typed vegetation without a hand-built regional pack. Fetch the data with fetch_landfire.py, then build vegetation with TWIN_PACK=us-national.

bundled.landfire_evt_vat.json: National LANDFIRE 2024 EVT value->name+physiognomy table (CONUS, public domain)
